case_title: NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL C.U. VS TRAN SAU QUOC C/O PAPER RUSH CO.INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,277.30 FILED BY NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL C.U. AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN SAU QUOC C/O PAPER RUSH CO.INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-26-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF APR-27-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN SAU QUOC C/O PAPER RUSH CO.INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL C.U. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAN SAU QUOC C/O PAPER RUSH CO.INC. $2,277.30 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,292.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN SAU QUOC C/O PAPER RUSH CO.INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN SAU QUOC C/O PAPER RUSH CO.INC.
